title: Horrify+
description: not your ordinary minecraft horror pack
body:
# Introduction
I first created this modpack so I could play a bunch of horror mods with my cousins. We have always had fun with all of these mods, so thats why I decided to share it with y'all! Some mods present in this mod pack are: The Broken Script, no_moon.jar, some biome mods, and plenty of others. We are still planning on adding more horror mods. I have many ideas and plans for this mod pack and can't wait to share them.

# Features
- Horror (obviously)
- Decoration
- Biomes
- Weapons
- Seasons
- Farming
- Structures
- Quality of Life
- Shader Support
- And more!

# Quick note
As far as I know, you will not be able to create a server for this mod pack because of no_moon.jar, but I have a solution, and that is *Essential mod*, using this, you can play with friends, which in my opinion, is the best way to play horror.
